name: Extreme OBI-1 (Threshold Tightened)
hypothesis: Based on feedback for iter003_obi1_gt_075_h20, which showed a 91.8% WR, further tightening the threshold to an extreme 0.9 should isolate the highest-conviction trades, potentially increasing the win rate and expectancy at the cost of trade frequency.
mutation_note: Tightened threshold from 0.75 to 0.9 as per feedback and signal-improver proposal. Maintained 20-tick horizon to test persistence.
